title: Link api.json module tree and strengthen type references

source.subject: feat(doc): link api.json module tree and strengthen type references

body:
## Outcome

Link api.json module tree and strengthen type references.

## Context

- Workstream **analysis-pipeline** — compiler pipeline and api.json spine.
- Contributes to deliverable **api.json primary contract** (`v02-api-json-contract`).
- Structured **api.json** is the hierarchical contract for package docs (types, members, **typeRef** links)—not parallel string-key tables outside the schema.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`cf5ae82`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/cf5ae82) — feat(doc): link api.json module tree and strengthen type references
